commands.repair_reason: This PR needs contributor real behavior proof and a maintainer review after the family-specific gate fix; automation cannot provide the contributor's runtime evidence.; Needs attention: no dependency or workflow changes were found, but the current diff weakens runtime tool-family allowlist boundaries.; Review finding: [P1] Preserve the family-specific tool gates — src/agents/pi-tools.ts:875-883 (sha=e370f8d61c8fc2c8206c03b97887ee7996e2384a)
commands.review_summary:
The PR extends ChannelAgentToolFactory/listChannelAgentTools params with requesterSenderId and senderIsOwner, then forwards createOpenClawCodingTools sender context into channel-owned agent-tool factories.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: the supplied live PR diff source-reproduces the gate regression against current-main construction-plan behavior. The requested sender-context API is a new capability, so there is no current-main bug reproduction beyond confirming the API is absent.
